text.title: niche-evaluation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for niche-evaluation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Add "for [specific audience]" qualifier; if it matches more than 5% of the internet, it's not a niche.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always map at least 5 competitors; "no competition" usually means dead market, not blue ocean.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Passion matters but won't compensate for bad market; a bad niche with high personal fit is still a bad niche.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Even small niches should be quantified; a niche with <$1M SOM can't support a business.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Validation requires actual conversations; scoring alone is hypothesis-spinning.
